title: Mise en Place for Agentic Coding — Research Artifact Bundle
description: Research artifact accompanying the VibeX 2026 paper "Mise en Place for Agentic Coding: Deliberate Preparation as Context Engineering Methodology" (1st International Workshop on Vibe Coding and Vibe Researching, co-located with EASE 2026, Glasgow). The bundle contains anonymized hackathon timing and metrics data, the agent contract and planning corpus from the case-study workflow, and harness documentation for the three-phase preparation methodology. Published in support of the SIGSOFT Open Science Policy. The complete inventory and licensing terms are in artifact/README.md.
